signals.author: everpure_eng
signals.content_preview: In this post we explore NVMe over Fabrics performance characteristics for all-flash arrays. Our QLC-based systems achieve 2 million IOPS with sub-100 microsecond latency, representing a 3x improvement over the previous generation.

signals.author: everpure_marketing
signals.content_preview: Introducing the Everpure Enterprise Data Cloud: a unified data management platform that spans hybrid and multi-cloud environments. Built for AI-ready infrastructure with native Kubernetes integration.

signals.author: storage_news
signals.content_preview: Everpure positioned as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Primary Storage. The report highlights Everpure's strong focus on AI-ready infrastructure and cloud-native storage solutions as key differentiators in the enterprise market.

signals.author: cloud_native_daily
signals.content_preview: The Container Storage Interface driver for Everpure enterprise storage has reached general availability, enabling stateful workloads on Kubernetes with persistent storage that scales to petabyte级别.

signals.author: storage_news
signals.content_preview: New report shows 78% of enterprises are prioritizing immutable storage and air-gapped backup solutions for ransomware protection. Everpure's recently announced SafeMode immutability feature aligns with this trend.

signals.author: ai_infra_alliance
signals.content_preview: Building efficient data pipelines for large language model training requires storage infrastructure that can sustain high-throughput reads with low latency. We examine how parallel filesystems and object storage are evolving to meet AI workload demands.

signals.author: everpure_eng
signals.content_preview: How we built the Everpure Kubernetes Operator to manage persistent storage at scale. Using a custom controller with Kubernetes CSI and operator pattern to automate storage provisioning, snapshotting, and disaster recovery.

signals.author: cloud_native_daily
signals.content_preview: Best practices for running stateful workloads on Kubernetes: persistent volume claims, storage classes, and backup strategies. Includes benchmarks for database workloads on various CSI driver implementations.

signals.author: netapp_blog
signals.content_preview: NetApp ONTAP recognized as a leader in enterprise storage for the seventh consecutive year. The latest release delivers groundbreaking performance improvements for hybrid cloud deployments and AI workloads.

competitor_intel.signal_text: netapp ontap recognized as a leader in enterprise storage for the seventh consecutive year. the latest release delivers groundbreaking performance

signals.author: sysadmin_user
signals.content_preview: Anyone else considering migrating from Dell PowerStore to Everpure? We're tired of the licensing complexity and the support has been inconsistent. Looking at Everpure's all-flash line as an alternative.

signals.author: dell_tech
signals.content_preview: Introducing the next generation of Dell PowerStore: a new architecture that delivers up to 40% better performance than previous generations. Purpose-built for modern data centers with integrated AIOps capabilities.

competitor_intel.signal_text: introducing the next generation of dell powerstore: a new architecture that delivers up to 40% better performance than previous generations
